violations.text: Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. Dating of shellfish tags reviewed during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

Deli meats and cheeses were observed not marked with the date of opening/slicing. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Date marks were placed on food items during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of various dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Bowls were removed from containers during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the grill cooler drawers and the cold drawer set closest to the prep area and refrigerators. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/14/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the upstairs ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Establishment is to indicate which menu items are available raw or undercooked. PIC added indicating symbols to menu during time of inspection until menus are reprinted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

A leak was observed in the dry storage room. Food items were observed stored beneath the leakage. No sign of contamination was observed and food items were during time of inspection. Establishment is to refrain from storing food items in areas of potential contamination. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on both 2-door reach-in units and the downstairs 1-door reach-in freezer. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the upstairs ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. Drain on prep sink was observed to be an air break. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2025
